title: westia bracteosa
intro: Westia bracteosa, also known as the Westian or Coral Root, is a perennial plant native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Westia bracteosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herb in natural medicine. Westia bracteosa is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve for topical application, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
